---
title: "Art Gallery"
format: html
---

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![Shade: November, 2025](posts/shade/Scribbles.jpg){.lightbox}

![Frog Collage: April, 2025](posts/frog-collage/Frog.jpg){.lightbox}
:::

![All the World's a Stage: May, 2025](posts/all-the-worlds-a-stage/AllTheWorldsAStage.jpg){.lightbox}

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![Vanreno: April, 2024](posts/laurus/laurus.jpg){.lightbox}

![Annabella: March, 2026](posts/annabella/annabella.jpg){.lightbox}
:::

![Knox: April, 2024](posts/knox-drawn/knoxDrawn.png){.lightbox}

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![Valley: May, 2026](posts/rocky-pasture/Landscape.jpg){.lightbox}

![Zulius and the Northern Lights: May, 2026](posts/zulius-lights/ZuliusLights.png){.lightbox}
:::

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![Sunflower: June, 2026](posts/sunflower-tote/sunflower.jpg){.lightbox}

![Craig: July, 2024](posts/craig/craig.jpg){.lightbox}
:::

# Minecraft

![Knox, Minecraft: June, 2026](posts/knox/knoxCastle.png){.lightbox}

![Knox, Minecraft: June, 2026](posts/knox/knoxWindmill.png){.lightbox}

![Knox, Minecraft: June, 2026](posts/knox/knoxValley.png){.lightbox}

# Photography
![Capital Firefighter: February, 2026](posts/firefighter/FirefighterLadder.png){.lightbox}

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![Baltimore Renaissance: October, 2025](posts/baltimore-sunset/BaltimoreRenaissance.jpg){.lightbox}

![Driftwood Beach: June, 2025](posts/driftwood-beach/DriftwoodBeach.jpg){.lightbox}
:::
